purpose: WG-14 temporary inventory of non-research source imports from bithumb_bot.research. Entries are fail-closed: a new source file or imported research module must be reviewed and added with a migration reason.

scripts/channel_breakout_acceptance.py.reason: research diagnostic script; move with the channel-breakout research workflow.

scripts/channel_breakout_rootcause.py.reason: research diagnostic script; move with the channel-breakout research workflow.

src/bithumb_bot/approved_profile.py.reason: approved-profile validation still consumes promotion lineage, deployment policy, and strategy specifications.

src/bithumb_bot/broker/paper_execution.p.reason: paper execution reuses the research stress execution model.

src/bithumb_bot/compat/sma_runtime_compa.reason: legacy SMA runtime compatibility resolves strategy registry/spec metadata.

src/bithumb_bot/config.py.reason: configuration validates runtime strategy capabilities and parameter keys.

src/bithumb_bot/evidence_safety.py.reason: operator evidence safety rejects diagnostic research artifacts.

src/bithumb_bot/execution_quality.py.reason: execution-quality comparison reads research manifest provenance.

src/bithumb_bot/h74_observation.py.reason: H74 observation evidence hashes and validates runtime-bound strategy parameters.

src/bithumb_bot/historical_backfill.py.reason: historical backfill reuses the research date-range type.

src/bithumb_bot/notification_diagnostics.reason: notification diagnostics reuse research CLI policy resolution.

src/bithumb_bot/operator_commands.py.reason: legacy operator command facade still exposes research, data-plane, readiness, and calibration commands.

src/bithumb_bot/paired_experiment.py.reason: paired experiment is a research comparison workflow kept for evidence continuity.

src/bithumb_bot/profile_cli.py.reason: profile promotion and validation CLI retains research custody and candidate helpers.

src/bithumb_bot/runtime_adapter_bootstra.reason: runtime adapter bootstrap discovers registered strategy plugins.

src/bithumb_bot/runtime_adapters/daily_p.reason: daily participation runtime adapter references the SMA strategy spec.

src/bithumb_bot/runtime_adapters/sma_wit.reason: SMA adapter obtains runtime parameters from the strategy registry.

src/bithumb_bot/runtime_data_provider.py.reason: runtime data provider resolves strategy plugin capabilities.

src/bithumb_bot/runtime_sma_snapshot_bui.reason: SMA runtime snapshot hashes materialized strategy parameters.

src/bithumb_bot/runtime_strategy_decisio.reason: runtime decision evaluation resolves strategy plugins and capabilities.

src/bithumb_bot/runtime_strategy_set.py.reason: runtime strategy-set materialization uses the registry and specifications.

src/bithumb_bot/strategy_authoring.py.reason: strategy authoring API is intentionally shared with research backtest contracts.

src/bithumb_bot/strategy_config.py.reason: strategy configuration derives defaults from the SMA specification.

src/bithumb_bot/strategy_contract_testin.reason: test-support contract helpers expose research dataset and plugin types.

src/bithumb_bot/strategy_plugin_inventor.reason: operator inventory is a view over the strategy registry.

src/bithumb_bot/strategy_plugins/__init_.reason: plugin package exports the registry plugin type.

src/bithumb_bot/strategy_plugins/baselin.reason: baseline event adapter shares research event/spec contracts.
baseline plugins implement the shared research/runtime plugin protocol.

src/bithumb_bot/strategy_plugins/canary_.reason: canary plugin implements the shared research/runtime plugin protocol.

src/bithumb_bot/strategy_plugins/channel.reason: channel-breakout plugin is research-oriented but remains in the plugin package.

src/bithumb_bot/strategy_plugins/daily_p.reason: daily participation plugin shares SMA research/runtime contracts.

src/bithumb_bot/strategy_plugins/replay_.reason: replay threshold parameter schema uses the strategy specification types.

src/bithumb_bot/strategy_plugins/safe_ho.reason: safe-hold plugin implements the shared research/runtime plugin protocol.

src/bithumb_bot/strategy_plugins/sma_wit.reason: SMA assembly materializes the strategy spec.
SMA contract derives plugin/spec metadata from the registry.
SMA event adapter shares research event/spec contracts.
SMA plugin implements the shared research/runtime plugin protocol.
SMA projector uses dataset and spec materialization contracts.

src/bithumb_bot/strategy_plugins/thresho.reason: research-only threshold plugin currently resides in the shared plugin package.
